programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E1 El Nino
programme.desc: Chasing El Niño follows Chris Benchetler on an epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the vast slopes of British Columbia. Joined by longtime friends Bryan Fox, Scotty Smith, and Canadian pro skier Nick McNutt, Chris explores previously inaccessible terrain, searches for perfect powder, and faces challenging weather conditions. Along the way, the crew embraces the joy of skiing, building creative jumps at their campsite and making the most of every moment on the mountain. This episode captures the thrill of exploration, friendship, and the relentless pursuit of epic lines.

programme.title: S1E2 El Nino
programme.desc: Chris Benchetler continues his epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the massive slopes of British Columbia. This time, X Games gold medalist Jossi Wells joins him for "The Sierra Trifecta," tackling skiing, climbing, and biking all in a single day. Chris and his crew hike 6,000 vertical feet through rugged rock fields to chase the last snow of the season in the Sierras, pushing their limits and capturing every thrilling moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Clip Show
programme.desc: Ultimate GoPro: Unleashing epic moments!

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep109: Whale Sharks, Feeding Frenzies, and Great White Sharks.
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep107
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the kiteboarding doc With A Kite; profiles one of surfing’s greatest legends, Tom Carroll; checks out the O’Neill Coldwater Classic in Canada; and unveils Sligo, Ireland…an extreme surf sweet spot. Also featured is female big wave surfer, Maya Gabriel; an inside look at Pipeline from The Essence of Surfing; and wakeboarding innovator Dean Lavelle gives us his view on wakeboarding today.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In the season premiere of Farm Hero, host Laura Zaspel scours the country for the best farming practices and the people behind them. Her search winds her up in Gunnison Colorado at Parker pastures. Bill Parker and his daughters are fighting desertification with their grass-fed livestock. Using a collaboration with local farmers, Bill fights against the stigma of livestock farming with a holistic approach. Parker pastures breathes new air into the concept of farm-to-table.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In the season premiere of Farm Hero, host Laura Zaspel scours the country for the best farming practices and the people behind them. Her search winds her up in Gunnison Colorado at Parker pastures. Bill Parker and his daughters are fighting desertification with their grass-fed livestock. Using a collaboration with local farmers, Bill fights against the stigma of livestock farming with a holistic approach. Parker pastures breathes new air into the concept of farm-to-table.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: In Like a Train, the award-winning documentary that began as a student film project, you will follow the Clearwater Knights, a high school football team determined to have a perfect, undefeated season and to have fun doing it. With a coaching prodigy, not even twenty-five years old, at the helm, leading the team alongside his best friend, the Knights are a unique blend of humor, tenacity and heart. Their story will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights. Like a Train isn’t just about football, it’s about life, love and people.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E1 El Nino
programme.desc: Chasing El Niño follows Chris Benchetler on an epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the vast slopes of British Columbia. Joined by longtime friends Bryan Fox, Scotty Smith, and Canadian pro skier Nick McNutt, Chris explores previously inaccessible terrain, searches for perfect powder, and faces challenging weather conditions. Along the way, the crew embraces the joy of skiing, building creative jumps at their campsite and making the most of every moment on the mountain. This episode captures the thrill of exploration, friendship, and the relentless pursuit of epic lines.

programme.title: S1E2 El Nino
programme.desc: Chris Benchetler continues his epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the massive slopes of British Columbia. This time, X Games gold medalist Jossi Wells joins him for "The Sierra Trifecta," tackling skiing, climbing, and biking all in a single day. Chris and his crew hike 6,000 vertical feet through rugged rock fields to chase the last snow of the season in the Sierras, pushing their limits and capturing every thrilling moment.
